title: Snap Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2021 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2021 Financial Results

Key Financial Results

Revenue increased 116% to $982 million in Q2 2021, compared to the prior year. Net loss improved 53% to $152 million in Q2 2021, compared to the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA improved 223% to $117 million in Q2 2021, compared to the prior year.

User Growth

DAUs were 293 million in Q2 2021, an increase of 55 million, or 23%, year-over-year. The strong revenue growth was primarily driven by improvement in advertising effectiveness and growth in the user base.

Geographic Performance

Revenue growth was broad-based globally, with strong performance across all major regions. The results reflected broad-based strength of the business, with growth in both revenue and daily active users at the highest rates achieved in the past four years.
